name: Claude Sonnet 5
description: Claude Sonnet 5 is Anthropic's expected next Sonnet-class model. Public Anthropic documentation is not yet available, so this record is prepared for catalog and provider support without marking the model as released.

page_notice.markdown: Claude Sonnet 5 data is prepared from pre-release signals and API migration materials. Availability, pricing, context length, provider mappings, and model metadata may change when Anthropic and downstream providers publish official release documentation.

details.name: source_status
details.value: Unofficial social leak signal observed on 2026-06-30; no official Anthropic announcement or model documentation found as of 2026-06-30.

details.name: knowledge_signal
details.value: January 2026 according to the 2026-06-30 unofficial social leak; pending official confirmation.

details.name: context_window
details.value: 1,000,000-token variant reported by the 2026-06-30 unofficial social leak; pending official confirmation.

details.name: pricing_signal
details.value: Prerelease/API migration materials list standard Anthropic pricing at $3 per 1M input tokens and $15 per 1M output tokens, with introductory pricing at $2 per 1M input tokens and $10 per 1M output tokens through 2026-08-31.
